tools.name: apiCalls.getRecordsFormat
tools.description: This is the main search endpoint allowing queries against the records database.

tools.name: apiCalls.getRecordsRecordIdFormat
tools.description: If you know its `record_id` you can use this endpoint to view all metadata associated with that specific record.

tools.name: apiCalls.getRecordsRecordIdMoreLikeThisFormat
tools.description: This feature returns a set of search results that are similar (ie have similar metadata) to a specific record.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
